name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-32
title: Simplify rabbit_print banner format: drop trailing bars + trailing emoji (keep leading emoji + brand + content only)
description:
Visual simplification of the rabbit_print rendering contract.

Current format (rabbit_print.py line 72):
  [(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] ICON ━━━ content here ━━━ ICON

Wanted format:
  [(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] ICON content here

DROP: leading bar (━━━), trailing bar (━━━), trailing icon
KEEP: brand prefix, leading icon, content body, ANSI color
RABBIT_SUBLINE: unchanged (already brand + content, no icon, no bars)

Sample output after change:
  Banner: [(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] 🔑 HUMAN APPROVAL BYPASS ACTIVE — Step 4 skipped...
  Subline: [(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] philosophy.md — machine-first; bounded scope...

Banner vs subline differentiator becomes: leading ICON + color (banners only).

RATIONALE:
- Brand prefix + ANSI color already convey identity + emphasis
- Bars added visual clutter without semantic value
- Cleaner under compressed terminal widths
- Modern UX favors less decoration
- Trailing icon was redundant with leading icon

SCOPE OF CHANGE:

1. .claude/features/contract/scripts/rabbit_print.py
   - Line 72 (rabbit_print() return statement): change
     f'{c["ansi"]}{brand} {icon} {bar} {body} {bar} {icon}{c["reset"]}'
     to
     f'{c["ansi"]}{brand} {icon} {body}{c["reset"]}'
   - rabbit_subline unchanged

2. .claude/features/contract/schemas/rabbit-print-messages.json
   - Remove the top-level 'bar' field (now unused). OR keep with a
     comment indicating it's legacy/reserved. Recommend delete:
     dead data per Designed Deprecation.

3. .claude/features/contract/schemas/rabbit-print.schema.json
   - Remove 'bar' from required top-level fields if it was required;
     remove from properties if it was defined

4. .claude/features/contract/docs/spec/spec.md
   - Inv 34: drop 'bar' from required top-level keys list
   - Inv 35 (rabbit_print docstring contract): update the return-
     string format description from
     'f"{ansi}{brand} {icon} {bar} {text} {bar} {icon}{reset}"'
     to
     'f"{ansi}{brand} {icon} {text}{reset}"'
   - Inv 36: 'bar strings (━━━) ... outside rabbit_block are
     forbidden' — keep as defensive rule (no producer should emit
     bars even though rabbit_print no longer emits them), but reword
     to note that bars are deprecated entirely

5. Tests
   - .claude/features/contract/test/test-rabbit-print-renderer.py:
     update t5 / t6 / t9 / t10 assertions to expect new format
   - .claude/features/contract/test/test-rabbit-print-messages-schema.py:
     update schema-shape assertions
   - .claude/features/contract/test/test-rabbit-print-named-wrappers.py:
     update if any assert on the bar character

6. Hook test snapshots / fixtures
   - .claude/features/rabbit-cage/test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-20-leading-newline.py
     and others that snapshot rabbit_print output: update expected text
   - test-backlog-27-runtime-flags-display.py: any banner-shape
     assertions

7. No prose changes to LLM-emitted messages (rabbit-feature-touch
   SKILL.md Step 4 warning is plain '[(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] Step 4 SKIPPED' — already
   in the new format).

8. No marker file changes, no banner-text content changes — only
   the rendering format shifts.

CROSS-FEATURE IMPACT:
- Every producer (sync-check.py, session-init.py, refresh.py,
  tdd-step.py, dispatch-tdd-subagent.py via the wrapper) emits via
  rabbit_print so the change ripples to all banner emissions
  automatically — no producer-side code changes needed.
- Test snapshots in rabbit-cage and tdd-state-machine that capture
  rendered output need updating.

DEPENDENCIES:
- BLOCKED on CONTRACT-BACKLOG-31 (contract spec monotonic renumber)
  landing first. Both cycles edit contract/docs/spec/spec.md
  (Inv 34/35/36) and would collide. Run AFTER renumber so this
  cycle works on the renumbered baseline.

Acceptance:
- rabbit_print returns the new shorter format
- 'bar' field removed from registry + schema + Inv 34
- Inv 35 docstring contract reflects new format
- All tests pass (rendering snapshots updated)
- Visual confirmation: invoke any banner-emitting hook, observe new
  format in systemMessage output

history.note: Implemented: added format field (banner/compact) to registry and schema; rabbit_print() branches on format; welcome keeps banner (bars+trailing emoji), all 11 other messages use compact (brand icon text); all 7 feature test suites pass
